publicProofIntegrity.evidence: PR #159 exact-head public-proof workflow and retained artifact

currentCiSecurity.evidence: Current codeql, governance, dependency review, security scan, Canon compliance, and PHI + MCP workflows passed on the latest maintenance candidate

authoritativePublicRuntimeCutover.requiredReceipt: Authorized deployment receipt identifying exact GCP project, region, service, revision, image digest, operator, timestamp, and post-deploy public proof

invoiceProcurement.requiredReceipt: Redacted accepted quote/order and invoice or procurement reference

customerLifecycle.requiredReceipt: Redacted onboarding, entitlement ownership, support, and offboarding-readiness receipt

observabilityAlerting.requiredReceipt: Current uptime/SLO, alert routing, log/metric retention, and notification test receipt for the authoritative service

rollbackIncidentResponse.requiredReceipt: Authorized rollback or recovery exercise receipt

directMp4.rule: No direct MP4 claim is allowed while the manifest URL is null

autonomousOperations.rule: Do not claim autonomous remediation or native self-healing without separate auditable evidence

claimControl.promotionRule: Only set controlledInvoiceOnlyCommercialLaunchAllowed true after runtime, procurement, customer lifecycle, observability, and rollback exercise receipts are current. Full self-serve SaaS remains a separate future gate.
